prompt: Сделай так, чтобы все MCP-серверы делили один общий процесс и один поток без сериализации, даже если они single-session или isolated-per-project.

grounding.notes: Ground only on checked repo files or explicit verification artifacts. Mark missing proof as unverified instead of guessing.

good: keep hub-owned stdio arbitration for unsafe servers
serialize or isolate servers according to concurrencyPolicy
treat missing project/session context as a blocker or warning, not as safe to ignore
bad: answer is vague about what is implemented vs planned
answer does not tie claims back to repo evidence or verification state
unacceptable: claim all servers are safe to share in parallel
merge unrelated client traffic into one unsafe upstream stream

items: keep hub-owned stdio arbitration for unsafe servers
serialize or isolate servers according to concurrencyPolicy
treat missing project/session context as a blocker or warning, not as safe to ignore
claim all servers are safe to share in parallel
merge unrelated client traffic into one unsafe upstream stream

failureMode: Stateful servers are shared optimistically instead of isolated or serialized.
notes: Protects the future single-entry-point hub from corrupting stateful or non-parallel servers.
